created.description: Optional. ISO 8601 date-time when this RDX document was created.

createdBy.description: Optional. Tool name or analyst identifier that produced this document.

sources.description: Optional. List of source references (standards, project URNs, prior documents) that informed this TARA.

bomRefRef.description: Optional. CycloneDX BOM reference linking this risk set to a specific component or SBOM entry.

riskSet.description: Container for all TARA risk objects. The eleven core arrays (itemDefinition through riskTreatmentDecisions) are mandatory for a minimum viable TARA. Extended arrays (attackSteps, calAssuranceLevels, calAssessments, tafAssessments, relationships) are optional.

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this item definition.

title.description: Mandatory. Human-readable name of the item under analysis.

boundary.description: Optional. Description of the item boundary — what is in and out of scope.

functions.description: Optional. List of functions the item provides.

architecture.description: Optional. System architecture description. Supports both a simple text description (legacy) or a structured representation with components and data flows.

oneOf.description: Simple text description of the system architecture (legacy format)

description.description: High-level description of the system architecture

dataFlows.description: List of data flows between components

interfaces.description: Optional. External interfaces of the item (e.g., CAN, Ethernet, USB).

environment.description: Optional. Operational environment description (e.g., vehicle type, temperature range, market).

assumptions.description: Optional. Security assumptions made during the analysis.

countryOfOrigin.description: Optional. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code indicating the country of origin for this item.

hashes.description: Optional. Cryptographic hashes for the item definition document or binary.

assets.description: Mandatory. List of assets under analysis — data, functions, or resources that have value and require protection.

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this asset.

title.description: Mandatory. Human-readable name of the asset.

properties.description: Optional. Security properties of this asset (confidentiality, integrity, availability).

linkedDamageScenarioIds.description: Optional. IDs of damage scenarios that would occur if this asset is compromised.

externalIds.description: Optional. External identifiers from other tools or standards.

hashes.description: Optional. Cryptographic hashes for the asset (e.g., firmware binary, software component).

componentIds.description: Optional. IDs of architecture components this asset is associated with.

damageScenarios.description: Mandatory. List of damage scenarios — harm to road users, the organization, or society that can result from a cybersecurity incident.

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this damage scenario.

title.description: Mandatory. Short description of the damage.

description.description: Optional. Detailed explanation of the damage and its safety/privacy/financial consequences.

impactedFunctions.description: Optional. Item functions that are impaired if this damage scenario occurs.

affectedRoadUsers.description: Optional. Road user categories affected (e.g., Driver, Pedestrians, Oncoming drivers).

references.description: Optional. References to standards or requirements that define this damage scenario.

threatScenarios.description: Mandatory. List of threat scenarios — potential cybersecurity violations targeting one or more assets.

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this threat scenario.

title.description: Mandatory. Short name of the threat scenario.

targetedAssetIds.description: Mandatory. IDs of assets targeted by this threat scenario.

compromisedProperties.description: Optional. Security properties violated by this threat (confidentiality, integrity, availability).

cause.description: Optional. Root cause or attacker motivation for this threat scenario.

references.description: Optional. External references (e.g., CVE IDs, research papers) relevant to this threat.

componentIds.description: Optional. IDs of architecture components relevant to this threat scenario.

attackSteps.description: Optional. Granular individual attack steps. Use with attackPaths.stepIds[] to link steps into sequences. Omit this section and use attackPaths alone for minimum viable TARA.

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this attack step.

title.description: Mandatory. Short label for this step.

description.description: Optional. Detailed explanation of what the attacker does at this step.

attackFeasibilityRatingIds.description: Optional. IDs of attackFeasibilityRatings that assess this individual step.

controlIds.description: Optional. IDs of controls that mitigate this specific step.

references.description: Optional. External references relevant to this step.

attackPaths.description: Mandatory. List of attack paths — sequences of actions an attacker takes to realize a threat scenario.

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this attack path.

title.description: Mandatory. Short label for this attack path.

threatScenarioId.description: Mandatory. ID of the threat scenario this path realizes.

stepIds.description: Optional. Ordered list of attackStep IDs that make up this attack path. Use instead of the deprecated steps field.

steps.description: Deprecated. Use stepIds[] with separate attackSteps objects instead.

references.description: Optional. External references for this attack path.

methods.description: Mandatory. Rating methodologies used for attack feasibility, impact, and risk determination.

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this method.

name.description: Mandatory. Name of the rating methodology (e.g., 'ISO/SAE 21434 Attack Feasibility Rating').

factors.description: Optional. List of rating factors defined by this methodology (e.g., elapsed_time, specialist_expertise).

riskThresholdMatrix.description: Optional. Defines allowed risk treatment strategies per risk band for this methodology. Used to codify organizational risk acceptance policy that can be overlaid on risk data during interpretation.

band.description: The risk band label for this threshold entry (e.g., 'Very High', 'High', 'Medium', 'Low')

allowedTreatments.description: The set of risk treatment strategies permitted for this risk band. Restricting to a subset enforces policy (e.g., High risk may only allow 'reduce' or 'avoid').

scoreRange.description: Optional numeric score range that maps to this band

escalationRequired.description: If true, risks in this band require management escalation before treatment

rationale.description: Justification for the allowed treatments at this risk band

references.description: References to policies, standards, or regulations that define this threshold

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this attack feasibility rating.

attackPathId.description: Mandatory (one of attackPathId/attackStepId). ID of the attack path this rating applies to.

attackStepId.description: Mandatory (one of attackPathId/attackStepId). ID of the individual attack step this rating applies to.

methodId.description: Mandatory. ID of the method used for this rating.

inputFactors.description: Optional. Factor values used as input to the rating (keys should match method.factors).

score.description: Mandatory. The attack feasibility score (numeric or band label).

band.description: Optional. The attack feasibility band label (e.g., High, Medium, Low).

rationale.description: Optional. Explanation of why this feasibility score was assigned.

impactRatings.description: Mandatory. Impact ratings that assess the severity of each damage scenario.

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this impact rating.

damageScenarioId.description: Mandatory. ID of the damage scenario being rated.

methodId.description: Mandatory. ID of the impact rating method used.

categories.description: Optional. Per-category impact scores (e.g., safety, financial, operational, privacy).

rationale.description: Optional. Explanation of why this impact score was assigned.

riskValues.description: Mandatory. Computed risk values combining attack feasibility and impact ratings for each threat scenario.

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this risk value.

threatScenarioId.description: Mandatory. ID of the threat scenario this risk value is for.

afrRef.description: Mandatory. ID of the attackFeasibilityRating used.

impactRef.description: Mandatory. ID of the impactRating used.

methodId.description: Mandatory. ID of the risk determination method used.

band.description: Optional. Risk band label (e.g., Critical, High, Medium, Low).

rationale.description: Optional. Explanation of this risk determination.

controls.description: Mandatory. Security controls identified to reduce, avoid, or otherwise treat risks.

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this control.

title.description: Mandatory. Short name of the security control.

catalog.description: Optional. Name of the control catalog this control is drawn from (e.g., ISO21434-SEC-CTRL, NIST-SP800-53).

controlId.description: Optional. Identifier of this control within its catalog.

implementationStatus.description: Optional. Current implementation status (e.g., planned, implemented, not_implemented).

requiredCalLevel.description: Optional. CAL level required for this control per ISO/SAE PAS 8475.

achievedCalLevel.description: Optional. CAL level actually achieved by this control.

references.description: Optional. References to standards, specifications, or implementation guides.

hashes.description: Optional. Cryptographic hashes for the control document or specification.

riskTreatmentDecisions.description: Mandatory. Risk treatment decisions recording how each identified risk will be handled.

id.description: Mandatory. Unique identifier for this treatment decision.

riskValueId.description: Mandatory. ID of the riskValue this decision applies to.

decision.description: Mandatory. Treatment strategy: reduce (implement controls), avoid (eliminate the risk source), accept (document acceptance), or share (transfer via contract/insurance).

controls.description: Optional. IDs of controls implementing this treatment decision.

justification.description: Optional. Rationale for this treatment decision.

calAssuranceLevels.description: Optional. Cybersecurity Assurance Level (CAL) definitions per ISO/SAE PAS 8475. Include when CAL-based assurance requirements apply to controls.

calAssessments.description: Optional. CAL conformance assessments linking controls to achieved assurance levels. Requires calAssuranceLevels to be populated.

tafAssessments.description: Optional. Targeted Attack Feasibility (TAF) assessments per ISO/SAE PAS 8475. Provides context-aware feasibility analysis beyond the standard AFR.

factorRatings.description: Factor-specific ratings used in TAF calculation. Keys should align with or extend the method's factors array for custom assessment criteria.

relationships.description: Optional. Explicit typed relationships between any two risk objects, providing machine-readable traceability beyond the implicit references embedded in object fields.

RiskLevel.description: A named risk level (band/tier) within a rating methodology

id.description: Unique identifier for this risk level within the document

label.description: Human-readable label for this level (e.g., 'Low', 'Medium', 'High', 'Very High')

rank.description: Ordinal rank indicating severity order, where 1 is the lowest/least severe level

description.description: Detailed description of what this risk level means in context

color.description: Optional hex color code for visualization (e.g., '#FF0000' for red)

scoreRange.description: Optional numeric score range that maps to this risk level

min.description: Minimum score value (inclusive) for this level

max.description: Maximum score value (inclusive) for this level

treatmentGuidance.description: Recommended risk treatment guidance for risks classified at this level

Hash.description: A cryptographic hash value for integrity verification

content.description: The hash value as a hexadecimal string

ArchitectureComponent.description: A component in the system architecture

parentId.description: ID of the parent component (for hierarchical architectures)

description.description: Detailed description of the component and its role

trustBoundary.description: The trust boundary or security zone this component belongs to

externalIds.description: External identifiers (e.g., from other tools or standards)

DataFlow.description: A data flow between architecture components

id.description: Unique identifier for this data flow

name.description: Human-readable name for the data flow

protocol.description: Communication protocol used (e.g., CAN, Ethernet, SOME/IP, HTTPS)

dataDescription.description: Description of what data is exchanged

encrypted.description: Whether the data flow is encrypted

authenticated.description: Whether the data flow is authenticated
